category_sources: source_facts.description says libpst provides utilities for the PST file format; official homepage says utilities convert Outlook PST files to mbox, MH, DII, vCard, and LDIF formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libpst; official homepage title is libpst Utilities.
docs_sources: Official libpst homepage says the most recent documentation is on the project site and developer documentation is under /libpst/devel/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official libpst homepage links a Mercurial source code repository at hg.five-ten-sg.com/libpst.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names PST utilities; official homepage documents converting Outlook PST files to email/contact export formats.
